chunks.title: Creation Declaring God's Glory
chunks.reason: Describes the heavens and sun as a continuous revelation of God's work without human speech.

chunks.title: The Perfection of God's Law
chunks.reason: Lists attributes of the law and testimony with their benefits and value.

chunks.title: Prayer for Cleansing and Acceptance
chunks.reason: Contains a plea for forgiveness of hidden faults and a request for acceptable words.
